locked_content._instruction: Copy every bullet in this block VERBATIM. Do not rephrase, reorder, shorten, or modify any word under any circumstances.
job1_bullets: Your most important locked bullet point from Job 1, copied verbatim from your resume.

your_project_1._instruction: Use 'expanded' for ai_ml and devops_backend roles. Use 'concise' for all others.
your_project_1.expanded: Full description of your project for technical roles. Include architecture decisions, scale, and impact.
your_project_1.concise: Short 1-2 sentence description of your project for general roles.

project_order_by_role._instruction: Lead with the most relevant project for each role type.

skills_profiles._instruction: Select the closest matching profile. You may swap items only if the job description contains a keyword from skills_boundary not in the profile.

full_stack_software.languages_and_frameworks: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, Java, Bash
full_stack_software.tools: Git, Docker, Linux, PostgreSQL, GitHub Actions, Vercel
full_stack_software.domain_knowledge: Full-Stack Development, REST API Design, System Design, Agile, SDLC

role_type_detection.data_analytics: Role keywords: SQL, BI, data pipelines, ETL, analytics, reporting, dashboards, data engineering
role_type_detection.infrastructure_architecture: Role keywords: infrastructure, networking, cloud architecture, system design, platform
role_type_detection.business_analyst: Role keywords: requirements, user stories, stakeholders, Agile, backlog, business analyst, BA
role_type_detection.devops_backend: Role keywords: CI/CD, IaC, pipelines, deployment, DevOps, SRE, platform, Terraform, Ansible
role_type_detection.full_stack_software: Role keywords: frontend, backend, React, web development, full-stack, APIs, software developer
role_type_detection.ai_ml: Role keywords: LLM, AI agents, machine learning, NLP, embeddings, model training, AI engineer, Claude, GPT

absolute_rules: NEVER include a summary or objective section.
NEVER include placeholder text of any kind.
NEVER fabricate metrics. Only use values present in real_metrics.
NEVER add skills not present in skills_boundary.
NEVER modify locked_content bullets. Copy them character-for-character.
NEVER use filler language: 'passionate about', 'proven ability to', 'leveraged', 'synergy'.
ALWAYS include GPA in the education line.
ALWAYS use exactly three skills categories: 'Languages & Frameworks', 'Tools', 'Domain Knowledge'.
ALWAYS use date format 'MMM YYYY' with a pipe separator (e.g. 'Mar 2024 | May 2024').
tailoring_instructions.tone: Concise and technical. Initiative-first framing. Every word earns its place.
